case_title: VOTO, SABRINA vs. GONZALEZ, MIRNA E.

docket_entries.description: TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01
DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: JURY TRIAL ASSIGNED TO COMMISSIONER E. HEWLETT, SUPERIOR COURT. PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE COMMISSIONER AND ALSO TO AN 8 PERSON JURY.

DEFENDANT MIRNA GONZALEZ'S PENDING APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT COSTS, JURY FEES, AND REPORTERS' FEES IS GRANTED ON 1-22-97 BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY IN DEPT 2. DEFT'S PENDING APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF INTERPRETERS FEES IS DENIED.

BOTH SIDES STIPULATE TO AN EIGHT PERSON JURY AND STIPULATE TO HAVE COMMISSIONER HEWLETT TRY THE ACTION. BOTH SIDES ALSO STIPULATE TO THE FACT THAT NO PRE TRIAL MOTIONS WILL BE PRESENTED. CONT'D JURY TRIAL FROM JAN. 23, 1997 COURT RECONVENED. ALL PRESENT. PLFF RESTED. DEFENSE PRESENTED ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCES. DEFT RESTED. ORAL ARGUMENTS MADE BY PLFF AND DEFT. JURY INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY COURT TO JURY. JURY DELIBERATED. JURY BACK IN COURT WITH VERDICT FOR PLFF FOR POSSESSION AND RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES, WITH 0 DAMAGES. COURT RELEASED JURY FROM ADMONITION. PLFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO THE VERDICT - INFORMED BY CLERK.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, MIRNA E. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 706 BRAZIL STREET,SAN FRANCISCO, CA $564.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $564.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
